2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch exports the `mhp_get_default_online_type` function from the Linux kernel's memory hotplug module to allow drivers that use DAX (Direct Access) to build and function even when hotplug is disabled. The function returns a default online type, which in this case is non-destructive (`MMOP_OFFLINE`). This change enables co-mingling of hotplug and devdax use cases within the same driver code without breaking other non-hotplug use cases.
